description_long: This is a large, stylized hammer with a rectangular, blocky head and a long cylindrical handle. The head is matte black with beveled edges and features a glowing blue triquetra symbol on its side, giving it a mythical or fantasy appearance. The handle is wrapped in a dark brown material with lighter bands, providing a textured grip, and ends in a metallic cap with a looped leather strap for carrying or hanging. The hammer's proportions and design suggest it is more ornamental or ceremonial than a typical construction tool, possibly inspired by Norse mythology. The surface of the head is smooth with some subtle wear marks, and the overall build appears robust and heavy. No visible brand markings are present, but the glowing symbol is a distinctive decorative element.
description: A large, black, blocky hammer with a glowing blue triquetra symbol and a long, banded handle with a leather strap.
description_view_0: Side view showing the glowing blue triquetra symbol on the hammer's head and the full length of the handle with its banded grip.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rectangular shape of the head and the circular cross-section of the handle with the attached strap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the triquetra symbol and the handle's grip details, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the flat striking face of the hammer and the alignment of the handle with the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle wrapped in brown leather with lighter grip bands and a looped leather strap at the end.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with flat striking faces and beveled edges, featuring a glowing blue triquetra symbol on the side.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Leather strap loop attached to the end of the handle
